## Backend Subtasks

- [ ] [BACKEND] Create API endpoints (#issue_link)

## Definition of Done
- [ ] All Frontend and Backend subtasks are closed.
- [ ] Working successfully in the development environment.
- [ ] No build errors and code is properly formatted.
- [ ] PM acceptance and final approval obtained (@szczukabendeguz).
